With the survival of the inn on the line, the two are pit against one another as they confront the owner and his son, whom have clashing opinions on the matter.

While they assumed the commotion would subside on its own, the rift between fans only grows deeper and deeperŌĆ” In an attempt to resolve the situation, Tetora and Kuro come up with an event to show off the bond between the two agencies.

name: Audition VS GOURMET -Second piece-
intro_lines: It's the high-profile "4piece" audition program! Chiaki and Mitsuru are assigned to the second venue "Gourmet Town", where each person is given a restaurant and challenged to a "Restaurant Management Competition". First, they each try their hand at the recipe challenge, butŌĆ”

name: Scent of Summer! Yellow Summer Sparkle
intro_lines: ALKALOID visits Paris to tour an upcoming event. While thoroughly enjoying their time off, they were made to change their accommodations due to some trouble. They head over to Aira's grandparent's house, but their main problem is that Aira seems reluctant to goŌĆ”

name: SHUFFLE├ŚBallade of the Eternally Lost Ones
event_gacha: Song of the Hesitant Waning Moon ŌĆō Look back ŌĆō
intro_lines: The group is chosen to star in a movie as part of the P-Choice project. The director is someone whom Yuzuru and Niki had saved from a certain incident, which led to them being chosen to co-star in the movie. However, acting as a "non-human" role is not so easyŌĆ”

name: Audition VS AUDIENCE -Third piece-
intro_lines: It's the high-profile "4piece" audition program! Wataru and Izumi are assigned to the third venue "Twin Rooster Pagoda". To take part in the live judging on the final day, it is crucial to make a good impression on the "Audience of a Hundred" that changes out daily, andŌĆ”?

name: Night OutŌśģAn Ephemeral Festival of Revelry
intro_lines: Upon the start of the new fiscal year, Crazy:B receives a surge in work. Behind it all is a massive boom centered around HiMERU and Kohaku, who have come to be known as the PBB (Pastel Bee Brothers), the both of them receiving unusual attention from the publicŌĆ”

name: Full SpeedŌŚåChase Cheshire in WILDLAND
intro_lines: RYUSEITAI has been selected for WILDLAND, a large-scale event inspired by Alice in Wonderland. Tetora, as the acting captain, thoroughly struggles to depict a wild worldview of devastation where all order has been lost.

name: Audition VS GLADIATOR -Fourth piece-
intro_lines: It's the high-profile "4piece" audition program! Jun and Sora are assigned to the fourth venue, "The Arena." They strive to become ŌĆ£The Strongest GladiatorŌĆØ in the venue, which is said to be a miniature version of the idol industry, but the idols each have something on their mind, troubling themŌĆ”

name: forgotten’╝ŖA Fairy Tale Left Half-read
intro_lines: Eichi watches over Tori at his side as he works on the construction plan for ATLANTIS. Tori completes his project proposal after finding inspiration from a certain book he comes across, but this proposal brings out an emotional reaction from Eichi.

name: The Howling ForestŌśģLupine Halloween
intro_lines: Keeping up the momentum, Madara is eager to take a new step forward with MaM. As he thinks about doing a big project together with the producer, of whom he has a complicated relationship with, he discovers a proposal that was rejected the year priorŌĆ”

name: Build! FREEDOM Packed with Ideals!
intro_lines: As their first job of the new fiscal year, Trickstar will be taking part in Urban Development Plan: FREEDOM. Makoto becomes addicted to this simulation game, where you live in a fictional town and develop it, butŌĆ”

name: Melted Heart’╝ŖSnow White of Memories
intro_lines: Esupuri's first job following their formation will be to advertise sweets from the "Princess Series". However, during an interview with the confectionery maker, Yume causes a big problem.

name: OVERŌśģHop Across HRCN!
intro_lines: Nazuna is asked by his university's choir for a rock 'n' roll Ra*bits to perform at an event. He feels anxious about performing in a different direction than the "cute" one they've pursued up until now.

name: Uncertain Skies’╝ŖThe Legend of KAGETSU of the Illuminating Attire of Ascension
intro_lines: Doubting the path to success their agency has laid out for them, Keito continues to search for ways to demonstrate AKATSUKI as idols who "seize the present". He tries to organize a live with Ibuki as a guest, as was promised during 4piece, but...

name: The Hour of Evolution! The Cadence of Stars Across the Universe
intro_lines: Mika is thrown into immense confusion when a plan is suddenly announced for him to to travel to space alone. With the entire agency hyping up the "Travel to Space" project, Shu says that it's derived from Mika's dream. However, Mika has not a single clue where it came from...
song_name: Hoshi no Meidou Hibikishi Toki ni

name: Trials of LoveŌŚåA Love Collector Dancing with a Step
intro_lines: Now graduated from Yumenosaki Academy, Arashi tries to confess her feelings to Akiomi, of whom she's had an unrequited crush on for many years. However, the confession takes an unexpected turn... Heartbroken, Arashi initiates a "Duel of Love" against the other members of Knights.

name: ColorfulŌśģShining Stars of the World
intro_lines: "ASTRO FES", a large-scale music event, is going to be held! Chiaki, Jun, Izumi, and Natsume meet with some students from Shibuya who work "in fields different than of being an idol", and will be performing at the festival in a collaborationŌĆö

name: FulfillmentŌśģA Twice-Made Wish
intro_lines: As the agency's vice president, Tsumugi is very busy welcoming new recruits, when the president of NEW DIMENSION, Arata Mototsugi, returns to Japan following his business trip abroad. Tsumugi is then suddenly informed by Mototsugi that he is being dismissed from his position as Vice President...

name: SHUFFLE├ŚThe Fallen Angels' Banquet
intro_lines: As guests, Shinobu and the others will perform as a Shuffle Unit to liven up a banquet hosted by Tsukasa. The project will have a theme of "Hidden Sides," but the members' feelings seem to be all over the place...

name: SlitherŌŚåOuroboros and its Dwelling Deep Underground
intro_lines: The President of COS PRO is stepping down, so Ibara temporarily entrusts the position to the producer. However, a project called "Everyone's FriendlyŌśģCOS PRO Fan Meeting" is created, which was not part of Ibara's plan...

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅPREQUEL: Metamorphose
intro_lines: 4piece has ended and the idols' lives have returned to normalcy, when one day, the mysterious blimp MEGA SPHERE suddenly flies into the sky above ES. With Tori, Rei, Rinne, and Madara calling themselves the "Four Sky Kings," a never before seen live is about to begin...!

name: ThanX FestivalŌśģA HAPPY ANNIVERSARY of Meeting You
intro_lines: Trickstar is up first to bat in performing for the ES Fan ThanX Festival. Trickstar is collecting mementos that remind them of their past, when Hokuto discovers mysterious pairs of children's shoes at his grandmother's house.

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅSTREAM1: Sailing Ceremony
intro_lines: The new program Mega Stream has begun, and Trickstar has begun living together. In hopes to be selected for a special program held every weekend, Subaru performs the best he can for the program. However, a conversation he has with Esu causes a stir...?!

name: ThanX Festival’╝ŖWorld Switching that Weaves Connections
intro_lines: Switch is developing a game that all their fans can play for their ES Fan ThanX Festival. As Natsume and the others visit a shrine to use as reference for their stage, they hear rumors of a "spiriting god" sealed away within the mountain there.

name: ThanX Festival! A Pair-ring That Brings Out the Best in Each Other
intro_lines: Niki has been instructed to come up with the contents of the Fan ThanX Festival Crazy:B will be hosting. However, all his plans that involve cooking end up rejected full-stop. After Niki vents about it to HiMERU, he ends up lending a hand with the planning, but...

name: ThanX FestivalŌśģGazing Upon winkWINK
intro_lines: Yuta is taking initiative in the planning for 2wink's Fan ThanX Festival. Yuta is determined to do it better than if Hinata would have, but he gets into some trouble with the event management company they're working alongside...?

name: ThanX Festival! The Velvet Ship Lying Within an Illusion
intro_lines: UNDEAD chooses to hold their Fan ThanX event with the familiar theme of "pirates." They head to the port town they'll be holding their live at for a preliminary inspection. There, Kaoru and the others have a run-in with a ghost ship and become trapped within the town.

name: SHUFFLE├ŚSwaying With Fondness and Summer Love
intro_lines: The members selected for P-Choice will be filming a mini-drama that intertwines a village's traditional summer festival rites and memories between friends. Kanata and Mayoi were selected to play the lead roles, two childhood friends, but things are awkward...

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅSTREAM2: Athletic Atmos
intro_lines: The Grand Bunny Athletic Meet, where all participants wear bunny ears and compete against each other, has finally begun! Seeing Shu grow distraught with all the "Nice!"s flooding the streams, Ritsu tries to act as a bridge between the producer and Valkyrie, but...

name: ThanX Festival! The RaRaRa’╝ŖStation I Want to Deliver To You
intro_lines: Ra*bits has decided to ask their fans for what they'd personally like them to do for the ES Fan ThanX Festival. As their leader, Tomoya is determined to come up with a fun idea that doesn't overlap with the other units' ideas.

name: ThanX FestivalŌÖźMagical Unis Meet Their Heart-chans
intro_lines: Kanna is tasked by NEW DI to grow their fan base as a means to give them more experience as idols. They take on work that allows them to interact with their fans, but Kanna is struggling tremendously in putting on a natural smile...

name: ThanX FestivalŌŚćBattalion Butterfly in WILDLAND
intro_lines: Souma is shocked to hear that Ibuki is in charge of composing the music that will be used for WILDLAND. With his competitive spirit fueled after seeing the opportunity his junior received, Souma is then unexpectedly given the major role of organizer for their Fan ThanX Festival by Keito.

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅSTREAM3: Inferno Influence
intro_lines: The "Grand Idol Theater Festival," a team competition based on the theme of "Hell," has been announced, and this time, Ibara is incredibly intent on becoming one of the Selected Six of Song. However, his teammate Raika just can't seem to memorize the script, and the atmosphere becomes tense.

name: ThanX Festival’╝ŖLa V├®rit├® of Speaking About Love
intro_lines: With Jun's overseas debut date approaching, every day has been hectic for Eden. In light of Eve's activities having to be scaled back, Hiyori is enthusiastic to take the lead in planning their Fan ThanX Festival. However, a problem suddenly arises within the Tomoe household...

name: SHUFFLE├ŚKumaKuma ResQ!
intro_lines: As part of their activities for the P-Choice project, Leo and the others will be revitalizing a bowling alley near Yumenosaki. Nazuna, the one in charge of coordinating the Shuffle Unit, senses somewhat of a tense atmosphere...

name: ThanX FestivalŌśåLight Up Your Heart and OVERFLOW!
intro_lines: Chiaki is making preparations to light up a tower for the Fan ThanX Festival. A fan sends a letter in to their suggestion box after hearing the news, and Chiaki begins to worry if this is truly the right choice for RYUSEITAI's project.

name: ThanX FestivalŌŚćRewinds Spun by a Needle's Tip
intro_lines: For Valkyrie's Fan ThanX Festival, Shu proposes they invite their fans to a feast of art and music at the Palace of Valsailles, which he designed from the ground up. However, they are told they must scale the event back, so he and Mika work to think of something suitable.

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅSTREAM4: Dynamic Diamond
intro_lines: The ES idols are stirring with excitement following the announcement of the "Japan vs. US Live Showdown," revealed alongside the arrival of MELLOW DEAR US. Makoto is worried about the Producer as she agonizes how to select the representatives, while Koga bites back, objecting to the selection method...

name: ThanX FestivalŌÖ¬Sky Musica We Long to Play With You
intro_lines: With their Fan ThanX Festival approaching, fine splits into two groups and compete their proposals against each other after they disagree on what to do. While Eichi's group aims for a concept that is fantastical and idealistic, Yuzuru's group is focused on figuring out a proposal that involves and has fun with their fans.

name: ThanX Festival’╝ŖWriting Out These Meaningful Words
intro_lines: ALKALOID begins to jointly manage their social media account as a way to hype up their Fan ThanX Festival. Mayoi, feeling unaccustomed to posting online, teams up with Tatsumi and begins to search for a way to express himself in his own words, but it isn't going very well.

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅLAST STREAM: Mainstream Megasphere
intro_lines: Aiming for victory, Hokuto presses to be selected for the Japan vs. US Live Showdown. However, the Producer, cornered, is nowhere to be seen around the Mega Sphere. Left behind, the ES idols are in shock...

name: ThanX FestivalŌśåTraveling Around on the Orbit
intro_lines: Although he was approached about his plan for his Fan ThanX Festival, Madara is worried about what direction he should take as the solo unit MaM. As per Tsumugi's suggestion, he participates as a guest in a public marathon held in Tokyo. Together with Mitsuru, who volunteered to accompany him, they hear out the voices of the city.

name: ChewingŌŚåBUBBLE GUM DANCE That Leaves Bite Marks
intro_lines: MELLOW DEAR US is starting their idol activities in Japan as affiliates of Rhythm Link. The night before the first day of their co-produced performance, Juis dreams about memories of the time he's spent with Nice.

name: ThanX FestivalŌŚåShrouded Beneath a Mask in the MASQUERADE NIGHT
intro_lines: The members of Knights all suggest event ideas for their Fan ThanX Festival. As all sorts of ideas fly up into the air, Tsukasa hopes to deliver a charming experience that will satisfy all of their princesses. However, he's at an impasse...

name: Mega Stream Arc’╝ÅEXTRA STREAM: ONLY YOUR STARS!
intro_lines: The 24-hour streaming has come to an end, and the Mega Sphere has begun operating as a floating city. The producer is in charge of planning the ceremony to commemorate the official opening, and after hearing out Subaru and Hiiro, they decide to hold a school festival.

name: World Tour Arc’╝ÅAREA 01: AKATSUKI VS Crazy:B
intro_lines: Vying for the title of "World's Best Idol," the preliminary rounds for MM have begun. AKATSUKI and Crazy:B will face off in their live showdown in America, but when HiMERU and Ibuki's complicated pasts become intertwined, the situation takes an unexpected turn...

name: EcstasyŌŚåLure ├Ś Ruler in WILDLAND
intro_lines: Wataru is preparing for their role as The Duchess for their WILDLAND performance. However, fine is unable to make it for the month scheduled, and they end up taking up the role of The Queen of Hearts instead. With his old plans completely out the window, Wataru has trouble switching gears.

name: World Tour Arc’╝ÅAREA 02: Knights VS Trickstar
intro_lines: Knights and Trickstar prepare for the MM preliminaries as a showdown between predestined rivals. Makoto, who is grappling to find a strategy for overseas, and Leo, whose deep desire to help his unit gets him nowhere, will have to face both of their resolves head-onŌĆ”

name: Trial! A Golden Dream for Myself
intro_lines: In pursuit of further growth, Jun travels to America. With the support of Thunderbolt, he's about to take his first steps as an artist in a new country, when his manager shows upŌĆöand it's none other than his own father, Zen Sazanami...?!

name: Spotlight Time ŌĆó Rite of Dawn ~Ballad of the Forest Fairies~
World Tour Arc’╝ÅAREA 03: Special for Princess! VS Ra*bits
intro_lines: It's time for the "cute" showdown to kick off, which has gathered much public attention, and Hajime hardens his resolve, determined not to lose under any circumstances. The two units begin unit activities in Hawai'i, but explosive remarks from Yume and Esu cause unexpected turmoil.
